@startuml
left to right direction
actor Actor
participant "EventBus" as EventBus
participant "Service Orchestrator" as SO
participant "Software Defined Infrastructure" as SDI

SO contains "so" as so1
SDI contains "storageresource" as storage1
SDI contains "storageresource" as storage2

Actor -> EventBus : Version Application Stack
so1 -> storage1 : list (name: hello,file: ./templates/world.yml)
EventBus --> so1 : data.list
so1 -> storage2 : list (name: hello,file: ./templates/world.yml)
EventBus --> so1 : data.list

Actor -> EventBus : Version Application Stack
so1 -> storage1 : list (name: hello,file: ./templates/world.yml)
EventBus --> so1 : data.list
so1 -> storage2 : list (name: hello,file: ./templates/world.yml)
EventBus --> so1 : data.list

@enduml
